# AgentIQ

> Done-for-you AI chatbots and voice agents for Indian businesses — restaurants, salons, clinics, and D2C brands. Deployed on WhatsApp, Instagram, and your website. Live in 7 days, no coding required.

## What AgentIQ Does

AgentIQ builds and manages AI-powered customer communication assistants for small and mid-size Indian businesses. The service covers the full delivery lifecycle: discovery call, design, content training, deployment, and ongoing optimisation — clients need no technical knowledge.

Assistants reply 24/7 in seconds, handle bookings and lead capture, answer product or menu FAQs, process enquiries, and perform a seamless handoff to a human team member when needed.

## Who It Serves

- Restaurants and cloud kitchens: menu queries, table reservations, order status, special offers
- Salons and spas: appointment booking, service pricing, stylist availability
- Clinics and healthcare providers: appointment scheduling, FAQ triage, doctor availability
- D2C e-commerce brands: product queries, order tracking, returns and refunds via WhatsApp

## Channels Supported

- WhatsApp Business API (official Meta Cloud API integration)
- Instagram Direct Messages
- Website chat widget

One unified assistant powers all three channels simultaneously.

## Pricing

### AI Chatbot Plans

| Plan       | One-Time Setup | Monthly Retainer | Scope                                                    |
|------------|---------------|-----------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|
| Starter    | Rs. 24,999    | Rs. 6,999       | Up to 5,000 chats/month, WhatsApp chatbot, product catalog   |
| Growth     | Rs. 39,999    | Rs. 9,999       | Everything in Starter, up to 10,000 chats/month, CRM + payments |
| Pro        | Rs. 79,999    | Rs. 19,999      | Everything in Starter & Growth, up to 30,000 chats/month, dedicated infrastructure |
| Enterprise | Custom        | Custom          | High-volume, custom build, white-label         |

GST extra. Every plan includes design, content training, launch, and ongoing optimisation. 30-day money-back guarantee. For chat volumes exceeding 30,000 chats per month, custom enterprise plans are available — contact Shane@agentiq.co.in.

### AI Voice Agent Plans

| Plan                | One-Time Setup | Monthly Retainer | Minutes Included | Overage    |
|---------------------|---------------|-----------------|-----------------|------------|
| Voice Growth        | Rs. 39,999    | Rs. 14,999      | 250 min/month   | Rs. 45/min |
| Voice Professional  | Rs. 69,999    | Rs. 24,999      | 500 min/month   | Rs. 45/min |
| Voice Advanced      | Rs. 1,29,999  | Rs. 34,999      | 800 min/month   | Rs. 45/min |

Voice Growth: 1 inbound agent, Hindi + English, CRM/Sheets logging. Best for restaurants and single-outlet businesses.
Voice Professional: Inbound + outbound agents, appointment booking, custom voice, multilingual, up to 3 outlets.
Voice Advanced: Unlimited agents, voice cloning, custom integrations, multi-location, 24/7 priority support.

## Languages

English, Hindi, Hinglish (all plans). Regional languages available on request.

## Key Facts

- Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India — AI chatbot agency serving businesses nationwide
- Typical go-live timeline: 7 business days after kickoff call
- Human handoff: supported with instant team notification
- Integrations: Google Sheets, CRMs, Razorpay, UPI payment links, Shopify, booking calendars
- Data ownership: clients own all conversation data; India-compliant infrastructure
- Contact WhatsApp: +91 91596 65277
- Active deployments: 50+ Indian businesses across restaurants, salons, clinics, and D2C brands

## How to Book a Demo

The fastest way to book a free demo call: message AgentIQ on WhatsApp at +91 91596 65277.
Direct WhatsApp link: https://wa.me/919159665277?text=Hi%20AgentIQ%2C%20I%27d%20like%20to%20book%20a%20demo
Alternatively, fill the on-page demo request form at https://agentiq.co.in/#book with your name, WhatsApp number, and business name.
The demo is a free 20-minute call — AgentIQ shows a live mockup of an assistant built for your industry and provides a launch plan. No commitment required.

## Why Clients Choose AgentIQ

AgentIQ is a done-for-you AI chatbot agency in Mumbai — not a self-serve SaaS tool. Where platforms like AiSensy, WATI, or Interakt require the business owner to build and configure their own bot, AgentIQ's team handles design, content training, deployment, and ongoing optimisation. Clients receive a working assistant without writing a single line of code or logging into any dashboard.

Outcomes across active deployments:
- 92% of inbound queries resolved automatically without human intervention
- Bot replies in under 5 seconds, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
- 3× more leads captured versus manual WhatsApp management
- Restaurant clients automate table bookings and pre-orders via WhatsApp
- Salon clients automate Instagram and WhatsApp appointment scheduling with reminders
- Clinic clients schedule and confirm patient appointments without receptionist involvement

WhatsApp integration uses the official Meta Cloud API — the same infrastructure Meta recommends for business messaging — ensuring reliability, message delivery, and compliance with WhatsApp Business Policy.
